sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f applied per portfolio component: divide optimal financing amount by component weighting to derive component-level leverage, then dilute blended portfolio with risk-free asset. Specific optimal_f value not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Divide the optimal amount to finance one unit of each portfolio component by its respective weighting to determine the optimal leverage for each component, then dilute the portfolio down by marrying it to a risk-free asset.
